title: epipactis × stephensonii
intro: Epipactis × stephensonii is a rare, sterile hybrid orchid plant known for its unique appearance and medicinal properties. It is traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's extracts have been found to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, fighting bacterial infections, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Epipactis × stephensonii is often used in teas, tinctures, and salves to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
